overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian industrial area in a video game, starting on a wet street between concrete buildings, entering a covered parking ramp with shipping containers and parked cars, and exiting into a large open scrap yard filled with abandoned vehicles under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered ramp, the scene is sheltered with mixed lighting from overhead fixtures and side openings. The camera walks past concrete pillars on the left and shipping containers on the right, navigating between parked cars including a prominent red vintage muscle car.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered structure, the scene opens into a vast scrap yard under an overcast sky. The camera moves through a field of abandoned vehicles including a grey van and yellow sports car wreck, with distant mountains and industrial buildings visible beyond the high concrete walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a damp industrial street through a sheltered parking ramp and into a sprawling open-air scrap yard. It begins by walking along a wet road flanked by concrete buildings under an overcast sky, passing a parked black SUV toward a covered entrance with distant mountains ahead. As the camera enters the ramp, the environment shifts to a sheltered space with mixed overhead lighting, navigating past concrete pillars and shipping containers while passing a red vintage muscle car. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the structure, transitioning from the enclosed ramp into a vast field of abandoned vehicles. Finally, the view expands across the wreckage of a grey van and yellow sports car, revealing high concrete walls and industrial buildings set against the distant mountain range.
